title: ProfilesManagerCommands
description: Addon of the ProfilesManagerCore plugin that contains all the useful commands!
body: # ProfilesManagerCommands **ProfilesManagerCommands is an addon for the ProfilesManagerCore plugin.** This addon adds all the commands you need to interact with the main plugin! This addon has been created to separate the human-machine layer from the business layer of ProfilesManager! Here are the different commands available in game: - /administration - /profile **ProfilesManagerCore** : *https://modrinth.com/plugin/profilesmanagercore* ## Artwork the logo was made by game-icons.net under the CC BY 3.0 license.
